# proto-os frozen MICRO-vs-MONO benchmark baseline (demo only).
#
# Extracted from results/session_2026-04-21_1808_d154dcb/summary.txt,
# captured at commit d154dcb (tagged bench_baseline_qemu on main).
#
# Per-run medians are the median of 1000 iterations within a single
# boot. The values below are the median-of-run-medians across the
# number of runs given — a robust central-tendency estimate of the
# steady-state cost of each path under QEMU virt TCG emulation.
#
# This file is the presenter's OFFLINE source of truth for the numbers
# surfaced alongside the live demo. Do not edit by hand; regenerate by
# rerunning the M11 benchmark flow at the same commit (see
# docs/benchmarking.md) and copying the medians across.

schema=1
source_tag=bench_baseline_qemu
source_commit=d154dcb
iterations_per_run=1000
latency_runs=20
recovery_runs=40
mono_sys_write_cycles=267
micro_sys_write_cycles=1207
recovery_window_cycles=75268
